summary: The third review role could not be spawned because the agent thread limit was reached, so the orchestrator performed a local wording and promotion-label review. The log should record new-question gaps as evaluation/runner findings, not as confirmed model-answer failures.

outputs.description: local proposal replacing the unspawned report/log review role

accepted_fields_or_changes: Record metadata/corpus rows as sidecar rows rather than ordinary EDD rows.
Record Q070 as an intentional Q006 sidecar alias.
Record selected-project seed binding and resolved-vs-multiturn distinction.
Record that CSV-only source inspection can misclassify sparse fields compared with raw HWP/PDF text.
rejected_or_risky_items: Do not claim L122 improved answer performance or EDD.
Do not describe secondary variants as held-out validation.
Do not claim sparse-field failure until an actual answer run is executed and raw retrieval evidence is inspected.
needs_orchestrator_review: Ensure 업무일지.md avoids the forbidden Korean words.
Label next answer run as small smoke or diagnostic-only unless a new untouched set is frozen.

commands_run: Local rg review of L119-L121 log entries.
Local inspection of L122 sparse field guard output.
observed_results: New-question gaps were partially recorded in L119-L121 but needed a grouped L122 insight entry.
No files were modified by this local review contract.
